unit.comment: /*************************************************************************** * _ _ ____ _ * Project ___| | | | _ \| | * / __| | | | |_) | | * | (__| |_| | _ <| |___ * \___|\___/|_| \_\_____| * * Copyright (C) Daniel Stenberg, <daniel@haxx.se>, et al. * * This software is licensed as described in the file COPYING, which * you should have received as part of this distribution. The terms * are also available at https://curl.se/docs/copyright.html. * * You may opt to use, copy, modify, merge, publish, distribute and/or sell * copies of the Software, and permit persons to whom the Software is * furnished to do so, under the terms of the COPYING file. * * This software is distributed on an "AS IS" basis, WITHOUT WARRANTY OF ANY * KIND, either express or implied. * * SPDX-License-Identifier: curl * ***************************************************************************/
/* The last 3 #include files should be in this order */
unit.function_decl: static size_t mime_subparts_read(char *buffer, size_t size, size_t nitems, void *instream, bool *hasread);
static size_t encoder_nop_read(char *buffer, size_t size, bool ateof, curl_mimepart *part);
static size_t encoder_7bit_read(char *buffer, size_t size, bool ateof, curl_mimepart *part);
static size_t encoder_base64_read(char *buffer, size_t size, bool ateof, curl_mimepart *part);
static size_t encoder_qp_read(char *buffer, size_t size, bool ateof, curl_mimepart *part);
unit.comment: /* Quoted-printable character class table. * * We cannot rely on ctype functions since quoted-printable input data * is assumed to be ascii-compatible, even on non-ascii platforms. */

/* * get_vms_file_size does what it takes to get the real size of the file * * For fixed files, find out the size of the EOF block and adjust. * * For all others, have to read the entire file in, discarding the contents. * Most posted text files will be small, and binary files like zlib archives * and CD/DVD images should be either a STREAM_LF format or a fixed format. * */

function.name: VmsRealFileSize

unit.comment: /* * * VmsSpecialSize checks to see if the stat st_size can be trusted and * if not to call a routine to get the correct size. * */

function.name: VmsSpecialSize

unit.comment: /* * vmsfopenread * * For upload to work as expected on VMS, different optional * parameters must be added to the fopen command based on * record format of the file. * */

function.name: vmsfopenread

unit.comment:
/* (Quote from The Open Group Base Specifications Issue 6 IEEE Std 1003.1, 2004 Edition)
The basename() function shall take the pathname pointed to by path and return a pointer to the final component of the pathname, deleting any trailing '/' characters.
If the string pointed to by path consists entirely of the '/' character, basename() shall return a pointer to the string "/". If the string pointed to by path is exactly "//", it is implementation-defined whether '/' or "//" is returned.
If path is a null pointer or points to an empty string, basename() shall return a pointer to the string ".".
The basename() function may modify the string pointed to by path, and may return a pointer to static storage that may then be overwritten by a subsequent call to basename().
The basename() function need not be reentrant. A function that is not required to be reentrant is not required to be thread-safe.
*/

function.name: Curl_basename
mimesetstate

unit.comment: /* Escape header string into allocated memory. */

function.name: escape_string
function.parameter_list: (struct Curl_easy *data, const char *src, enum mimestrategy strategy)

function.name: match_header

unit.comment: /* Get a header from an slist. */

function.name: search_header
strippath
cleanup_encoder_state

unit.comment: /* Dummy encoder. This is used for 8bit and binary content encodings. */

function.name: encoder_nop_read
function.parameter_list: (char *buffer, size_t size, bool ateof, struct curl_mimepart *part)

function.name: encoder_nop_size

unit.comment: /* 7bit encoder: the encoder is just a data validity check. */

function.name: encoder_7bit_read
encoder_base64_read
encoder_base64_size

unit.comment: /* Quoted-printable lookahead. * * Check if a CRLF or end of data is in input buffer at current position + n. * Return -1 if more data needed, 1 if CRLF or end of data, else 0. */

function.name: qp_lookahead_eol
encoder_qp_read
encoder_qp_size

unit.comment: /* Argument is a pointer to the mime part. */

function.name: mime_mem_read
mime_mem_seek
mime_mem_free

unit.comment: /* Argument is a pointer to the mime part. */

function.name: mime_open_file
mime_file_read
mime_file_seek
mime_file_free

unit.comment: /* Argument is a pointer to the mime structure. */

function.name: readback_bytes
read_part_content
read_encoded_part_content
readback_part

unit.comment: /* Readback from mime. Warning: not a read callback function. */

function.name: mime_subparts_read
function.parameter_list: (char *buffer, size_t size, size_t nitems, void *instream, bool *hasread)

function.name: mime_part_rewind
mime_subparts_seek
cleanup_part_content
mime_subparts_free

unit.comment: /* Do not free subparts: unbind them. This is used for the top level only. */

function.name: mime_subparts_unbind
Curl_mime_cleanpart

unit.comment: /* Recursively delete a mime handle and its parts. */

function.name: curl_mime_free
Curl_mime_duppart
curl_mime_init
Curl_mime_initpart

unit.comment: /* Create a mime part and append it to a mime handle's part list. */

function.name: curl_mime_addpart
curl_mime_name

unit.comment: /* Set mime part remote file name. */

function.name: curl_mime_filename

unit.comment: /* Set mime part content from memory data. */

function.name: curl_mime_data

unit.comment: /* Set mime part content from named local file. */

function.name: curl_mime_filedata
curl_mime_type
curl_mime_encoder
curl_mime_headers

unit.comment: /* Set mime part content from callback. */

function.name: curl_mime_data_cb
function.parameter_list: (curl_mimepart *part, curl_off_t datasize, curl_read_callback readfunc, curl_seek_callback seekfunc, curl_free_callback freefunc, void *arg)

unit.comment: /* Set mime part content from subparts. */

function.name: Curl_mime_set_subparts
curl_mime_subparts

unit.comment: /* Argument is the dummy top part. */

function.name: Curl_mime_read
mime_rewind
slist_size
function.parameter_list: (struct curl_slist *s, size_t overhead, const char *skip, size_t skiplen)

function.name: multipart_size
mime_size
Curl_mime_add_header
add_content_type
Curl_mime_contenttype
content_type_match
Curl_mime_prepare_headers

unit.comment: /* Recursively reset paused status in the given part. */

function.name: mime_unpause
cr_mime_init

unit.comment: /* Real client reader to installed client callbacks. */

function.name: cr_mime_read
function.parameter_list: (struct Curl_easy *data, struct Curl_creader *reader, char *buf, size_t blen, size_t *pnread, bool *peos)

function.name: cr_mime_needs_rewind
cr_mime_total_length
cr_mime_resume_from
cr_mime_rewind
cr_mime_unpause

unit.decl_stmt: static const struct Curl_crtype cr_mime = { "cr-mime", cr_mime_init, cr_mime_read, Curl_creader_def_close, cr_mime_needs_rewind, cr_mime_total_length, cr_mime_resume_from, cr_mime_rewind, cr_mime_unpause, sizeof(struct cr_mime_ctx) };

function.name: Curl_creader_set_mime

unit.comment: /* Mime not compiled in: define stubs for externally-referenced functions. */

function.name: curl_mime_init
curl_mime_free
curl_mime_addpart
curl_mime_name
curl_mime_filename
curl_mime_type
curl_mime_encoder
curl_mime_data
curl_mime_filedata
curl_mime_data_cb
function.parameter_list: (curl_mimepart *part, curl_off_t datasize, curl_read_callback readfunc, curl_seek_callback seekfunc, curl_free_callback freefunc, void *arg)

function.name: curl_mime_subparts
curl_mime_headers
Curl_mime_add_header
